message:
test(extensions): add proptest strategies for malformed OAuth, capability mismatch bypass, and parallel dispatch

Expands the extension system's property-based test coverage with three
new test areas that exercise error handling and concurrency safety:

src/extensions.rs — malformed_oauth_object() strategy:
- Generates 10 malformed OAuth object variants: missing required fields
  (authUrl, tokenUrl, clientId individually), wrong field types (integer,
  boolean, null), arrays/objects where strings expected, and non-array scopes
  with wrong redirect type
- Used by register_provider_malformed_oauth_is_ignored proptest which verifies
  registerProvider accepts malformed oauth shapes without panicking and
  correctly extracts oauth_config only when all three required fields are strings

src/extensions.rs — capability_mismatch_case_strategy() strategy:
- Generates 6 capability mismatch scenarios: tool(read) with exec cap,
  fs(read) with write cap, exec with read cap, session with ui cap,
  ui with events cap, events with session cap
- Used by capability_mismatch_rejected_as_invalid_request proptest which
  verifies dispatch_host_call_shared rejects mismatched capabilities with
  InvalidRequest error code and descriptive "mismatch" error message

src/extensions.rs — concurrent_dispatch_parallel_tasks_same_manager_safe:
- Spawns 12 parallel tasks on a single runtime+manager, alternating between
  setModel and setThinkingLevel event dispatches plus set_name session calls
- Verifies no panics under true parallel dispatch and that final get_name
  succeeds after concurrent writes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
